focalElement: a noble hero holding aloft an ancient ornate blade heirloom, its hilt inlaid with a glowing pearl and silver filigree
secondaryElement: silver-pearl tunic with gold embroidery; soft light refracting through the blade; small star motifs in the hilt
notes: Silver-pearl + gold palette reflects champion-sword passive (+1 green at start of turn, +1 bonus heart on final-boss kill)
